functions.name: GetItemsUnderPath
functions.description: Get the items (folders and/or files) that exist under the given virtual path.

functions.name: GetItemsAtPath
functions.description: Get the items (folders and/or files) that exist at the given virtual path.

functions.name: GetItemAtPath
functions.description: Get the first item (folder and/or file) that exists at the given virtual path.

functions.name: GetAvailableDataSources
functions.description: Get the list of current available data sources.

functions.name: GetActiveDataSources
functions.description: Get the list of current active data sources.

functions.name: DeactivateDataSource
functions.description: Attempt to deactivate the named data source.

functions.name: ActivateDataSource
functions.description: Attempt to activate the named data source.
